title: UI Component - Encounter Generator
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-034' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-034' to ingest requirements
Create React component files in `frontend/src/components/` or `views/` for UIC-005
Implement UI layout, state management, and API integration
Run frontend tests or verify rendering
definition_of_done: React components implemented and rendering without errors
State management and API integration functional
All modified source files have @trace annotation
